assessments.status_rationale: Today’s bullets do not include any new BLS CPI release or a reported CPI-U year-over-year figure; no evidence the threshold has been met or missed.
No University of Michigan inflation-expectations reading (prelim or final) is cited in today’s news bullets.
The news bullets do not provide a closing value for the 5-year TIPS breakeven (FRED T5YIE) on any business day.
While the Iran war and oil-market policy (tanker reinsurance) are discussed, there is no cited Brent front-month futures settlement price at or above $110.
No EIA weekly petroleum status data or 4-week inventory-change figure is included in today’s bullets.
Today’s items discuss the Iran conflict broadly, but do not report a DoD contract award meeting the specified $1.5B size and explicit urgent replenishment/force-protection linkage.
No reporting in the bullets indicates House final passage (roll-call) of a War Powers-related bill/joint resolution restricting or conditioning action against Iran.
There is no referenced SEC filing (10-Q/8-K) or airline earnings material quantifying a ≥$100M revenue impact from Middle East route disruptions.
No bullet identifies Palantir as awardee of a new ≥$250M DoD/IC award explicitly tied to Middle East/Iran operational requirements or Gulf maritime security.
No CBP CSMS message, Federal Register notice, or equivalent public operational guidance about court-ordered refunds for a new global 15% tariff is cited today.
